title: helichrysum simulans
intro: Helichrysum simulans, also known as the small yellow curry, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Helichrysum simulans is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be applied topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
